problem id: 5d77eff6
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(1) AND NOT SHR(3)) XOR NOT SHL(5)

examples:
  11111101 -> 10111111
  01010010 -> 00011011
  00100011 -> 11011101
  00001000 -> 11101111
  10111110 -> 01010111
  11011000 -> 01011111
  10110110 -> 01010110
  11110101 -> 10111110
  00010010 -> 10011011
  01100111 -> 11011101

query: 11100001
predicted answer: 00011100
